summary: Issue #399 adds all nine deterministic recommendation workflows with stable ordering, truthful mock states, accessible interactions, persistent rejection, error recovery, and active-workflow assistance.

interfaceChanges.description: Replaces the placeholder with the mock recommendation list and interaction states.
Adds reusable accessible recommendation presentation primitives.

mappings.criterion: Workflow 1 is Priority and Workflows 2 through 9 remain in stable specification order
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::renders Workflow 1 as the Priority Card first, followed by 2-9 in stable spec order

mappings.criterion: No expected-impact ranking calculation changes mock ordering
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::never re-ranks by expected impact — order stays 1..9 regardless of differing impact values

mappings.criterion: Every card shows workflow name, signal, expected impact, confidence, capability, and reasoning
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::shows title, signal, expected impact, confidence, capability, and reasoning on every card

mappings.criterion: Expand reveals reasoning, evidence, eligibility, known limits, and risks inline
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::Expand reveals evidence, eligibility, known limits, and risks; collapsing hides them again

mappings.criterion: Reject removes a card until Manual Refresh
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::persists rejection until Manual Refresh instead of restoring it on remount

mappings.criterion: Unsupported Approve actions are disabled with a meaningful explanation
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::renders Approve as a real disabled button with an associated, meaningful explanation

mappings.criterion: The highlight workflow query focuses and visibly marks a real card
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::focuses and visibly marks the matching card for ?highlight=<workflow_key>

mappings.criterion: Empty, error, keyboard, touch, and reduced-motion states are tested
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::tests empty, error, keyboard, touch, and reduced-motion states

mappings.criterion: Contextual assistance receives active recommendation evidence and risks without decision authority
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::supplies active recommendation evidence and risks to contextual assistance

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed after remediation; Guardrails found no remaining blocking reliability, security, observability, performance, or acceptance-coverage gaps.
